headers.value: default-src 'self';    script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline';    style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';    img-src 'self' blob: data: https://*;    font-src 'self';    object-src 'none';    base-uri 'self';    form-action 'self';    frame-ancestors 'none';    upgrade-insecure-requests;
